# Orkyn Technologies

> Orkyn Technologies is a custom software development company, ERP software development company, SaaS development company, AI software development company, CRM and Salesforce development company, business automation company and digital marketing agency. Orkyn serves clients across the United Kingdom, United Arab Emirates, India, United States and Europe with offices in England (UK) and Tamil Nadu (India). Fixed-price engagements from $4,999.

## What Orkyn does

Orkyn is a technology and growth partner offering three core service pillars:

1. **Custom Software, ERP, SaaS, AI and Salesforce Development**, custom software development, ERP solutions, ERP implementation, SaaS product development, AI software, CRM development, Salesforce implementation, business process automation, workflow automation, digital transformation, systems integration, web application development, mobile app development, cloud software, enterprise software development, software modernisation and API integration.
2. **UX, UI and Product Design**, UX design, UI design, product design, design systems, interaction design and brand design for B2B SaaS and enterprise products.
3. **SEO, B2B Marketing and Growth Marketing**, search engine optimisation, technical SEO, performance marketing, growth marketing, B2B marketing, lead generation, conversion rate optimisation, marketing automation, content marketing, PPC management, brand strategy, SaaS marketing, demand generation and digital marketing.

## Markets served

Orkyn is a software development company UK, ERP software company UK, Salesforce consultants UK, SaaS development company UK, AI software development company UK, B2B marketing agency UK, SEO company UK and growth marketing agency London. Cities served across the United Kingdom include London, Manchester, Birmingham, Leeds, Glasgow, Liverpool, Sheffield, Bristol, Edinburgh, Cambridge, Oxford, Reading, Newcastle, Brighton, Nottingham, Cardiff, Belfast, Aberdeen and Cheshire.

Orkyn is a software development company Dubai, ERP solutions provider Dubai, custom software company UAE, SaaS company Dubai, Salesforce partner Dubai, AI software company UAE, digital marketing agency Dubai, SEO company Dubai and lead generation company Dubai. Cities served across the UAE include Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah and Umm Al Quwain.

Orkyn is a software development company India, ERP software company India, offshore software development company India, SaaS development services India, custom CRM software company India, Salesforce development India, AI development company India, digital marketing company India, SEO services company India and offshore SaaS engineering India. Cities served across India include Bangalore, Mumbai, Chennai, Coimbatore, Hyderabad, Pune, Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon, Ahmedabad, Kolkata, Jaipur, Lucknow, Kochi and Indore.

Orkyn also serves clients across the United States (New York, San Francisco, Los Angeles, Chicago, Boston, Austin, Seattle, Miami, Atlanta, Denver), Canada (Toronto, Vancouver), Australia (Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane), New Zealand (Auckland), Ireland (Dublin), Singapore, South Africa and Europe (Berlin, Paris, Amsterdam, Madrid, Stockholm, Lisbon, Warsaw, Vienna, Zurich) for the same service catalogue.

## Engagement model

- **One-Month Sprint**, $4,999 fixed-price project delivered in 4 weeks
- **Ongoing Partnership**, $4,499/month continuous development and support
- Two-week satisfaction guarantee, full refund within first two weeks if direction is wrong
- Fixed price agreed before any code is written
- Full code ownership transferred to the client, no vendor lock-in
- NDAs signed before any substantive conversation begins

## Key pages

- [Home](https://orkyn.ai/): Overview of Orkyn services, process, pricing, testimonials and FAQ
- [Custom Software, ERP, SaaS, AI and Salesforce Development](https://orkyn.ai/services/systems-development): Custom software development company, ERP software development company, SaaS development company, AI software development company, CRM development company, Salesforce development company, business automation company, workflow automation company, digital transformation company, systems integration company
- [UX, UI and Product Design](https://orkyn.ai/services/design-experience): UX design agency, UI design agency, product design agency, design systems agency for B2B SaaS and enterprise products
- [SEO, B2B Marketing and Growth Marketing](https://orkyn.ai/services/growth-performance): Digital marketing agency, performance marketing agency, growth marketing agency, B2B marketing agency, SEO company, marketing automation company, lead generation company, SaaS marketing agency
- [Privacy Policy](https://orkyn.ai/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://orkyn.ai/terms)

## Hybrid engagements

Orkyn frequently combines software development with growth marketing as one integrated engagement, software and digital marketing company, technology and marketing solutions provider, ERP and marketing automation company, SaaS development and growth marketing agency, AI software and marketing automation company, CRM development and lead generation services, enterprise software and marketing solutions, business automation and digital marketing agency.

- Hours: Monday to Saturday, 24-hour response window
